paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 87. Well below the 7-day average of 174 — the team is making real progress. 39 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — cleared all overdue.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 40 days past due with 33 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $36,824 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 38 days past due with 16 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **38 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $59,791 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 28 days past due with 13 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 14 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,497 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 7 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,243 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **38 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 3. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $23,413 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Down to 2 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **48 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,818 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Karim-Merchant:** **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **43 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,800 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Giselle Garcia:** Down to 4 overdue — making progress.

315 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **282 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 17 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$120,494 in payments going out this week** across 52 tasks — make sure funds are available. $62,025 expected in from 8 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 7. Keep the momentum going.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Down to 2 overdue — good. Close them out today. **48 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 61 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Giselle Garcia: Giselle Garcia is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Down to 3 overdue — good. Close them out today. **38 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 48 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Karim-Merchant:** 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **19 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 3 tasks in progress. 2 payment tasks need Operations attention. **43 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 43 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 23. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 16 overdue (oldest: 38d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **38 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 40 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 7 overdue — oldest first. **26 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jonas De Cardenas: Jonas De Cardenas is completely clean — no overdue tasks. Keep this up.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is carrying 33 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.
**Ginger Brown:** 33 overdue (oldest: 40d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
